name: Pro
description: PRO is the governance proxy token of Crypto DAO. The protocol operates under an open-source smart contract architecture with community multi-signature governance. All minting, treasury actions, and liquidity operations are executed on-chain under predefined rules. Genesis LP Initialization: • Treasury-backed minting executed via designated smart contracts • 400,000 USDT deposited as collateral to mint 200,000 PRO • 200,000 PRO paired with 800,000 USDT to establish initial LP liquidity Low-price PRO Allocation: • Low-price PRO access restricted to designated smart contracts • Node funds acquire PRO at a unified initial price of $4 • All low-price PRO allocated exclusively to node participants PRO is designed for long-term protocol operation and governance coordination, not short-term speculation. All treasury, minting, liquidity, and governance activities are permanently recorded on-chain and independently verifiable.
